events.title: Mega Raichu X/Y Raid Day
events.description: New and returning Trainers are always welcome.  Super Mega Raids required shields to be broken by Mega evolved pokemon, please come prepared.  Primal Evolutions DO NOT COUNT towards sheild breaking.

events.title: Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day
events.description: DMAX Blissey/GMAX Charizard for tanks.  GMAX Charizard/Cinderace for attackers.
